<!--
*** To edit this sheet please align them for tidy.
-->
## Commit Message Standard
Format: `type-emoji type(optional-scope): short-description`
Types of emoji:
|**Emoji**| **Emoji Shortcodes**         | **Type**    | **Description Examples**              |
|---------|------------------------------|-------------|---------------------------------------|
| ✨      | `:sparkles:`                 | feat        | New feature                           |
| 🐛      | `:bug:`                      | fix         | Bug fixes                             |
| 📚      | `:books:`                    | docs        | Documentation update                  |
| ♻️      | `:recycle:`                  | refactor    | Restructure code logic                |
| ⚡️      | `:zap:`                      | perf        | Performance optimization              |
| 🧪      | `:test_tube:`                | test        | Add / update test cases               |
| 🤖      | `:robot:`                    | ci          | CI workflow configuration             |
| 🔧      | `:wrench:`                   | config      | Update config/build files             |
| 📸      | `:camera_flash:`             | media       | Add media / screenshot assets         |
| 🔥      | `:fire:`                     | chore       | Cleanup, remove legacy code & files   |
| 🔒      | `:lock:`                     | security    | Security vulnerability fixes          |
| 🌐      | `:globe_with_meridians:`     | i18n        | Internationalization / localization   |
| 🎨      | `:art:`                      | style       | Code formatting / lint fixes          |
| 🚚      | `:trunk:`                    | move        | Move / rename files                   |
| 🔀      | `:twisted_rightwards_arrows:`| merge       | Merge branches / resolve conflicts    |


Examples:
```
✨ feat: new function
🐛 fix: bug repair
📚 docs: document update
♻️ refactor: code refactor
⚡️ perf: performance optimize
🧪 test: test cases
🔧 chore: config/build
🎨 style: code format
🔥 remove: delete old code
🤖 ci: workflow adjust
```
